summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PULSE new features (iteration 4): Guest history, Inside page, Exit page, Bar redirect, and Rewards placeholder. All 12 backend tests passed. All frontend UI flows verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test guests created with TEST_ prefix during testing (TEST_Lifecycle_Guest, TEST_Exit_Guest, etc.)
context_for_next_testing_agent: PULSE new features all working. History endpoint returns full event timeline including exits. Inside/Exit pages share same API (/pulse/inside) but different UIs. Bar page auto-redirects to /tap after 2 seconds. Rewards is placeholder with lock icon.

backend_api: ✅ GET /api/pulse/guest/{id}/history - Returns guest_id, guest_name, visits, spend_total, history array
✅ History includes entry_type 'exit' for exit events
✅ History returns 404 or handles nonexistent guest gracefully
✅ GET /api/pulse/inside - Returns guests array with guest_id, guest_name, entered_at, entry_type
✅ Inside correctly filters to guests with allowed entry and no exit after
✅ POST /api/pulse/exit - Registers exit event, returns entry_id, guest_id, decision='exit'
✅ Exit appears in guest history with entry_type='exit'
✅ Exited guest correctly removed from inside list
✅ Full lifecycle: intake → decision → inside → exit → not inside
frontend_ui: ✅ PulseHeader shows all 5 tabs: Entry, Inside, Bar, Exit, Rewards
✅ All tabs navigate correctly to their routes
✅ Entry page: ChevronRight (>) button visible on each guest row in Guests Today
✅ Entry page: Clicking arrow opens Guest History panel on right with name, email, visits, event timeline
✅ Inside page (/pulse/inside): Shows 3-column grid of guests currently inside
✅ Inside page: Each guest card has Exit button
✅ Inside page: Shows total count (e.g., '3 guests currently inside')
✅ Inside page: Clicking Exit button removes guest and shows toast
✅ Exit page (/pulse/exit): Shows 2-column layout - guests inside on left, Recent Exits on right
✅ Exit page: Search input works for filtering guests
✅ Exit page: Tap-to-exit flow (clicking guest row triggers exit)
✅ Bar page (/pulse/bar): Shows 'Redirecting to TAP...' message with Beer icon
✅ Bar page: 'Open TAP Now' button visible
✅ Bar page: Auto-redirects to /tap after 2 seconds
✅ Rewards page (/pulse/rewards): Shows Gift icon and 'Loyalty & Rewards' title
✅ Rewards page: Three placeholder cards (Points, Tiers, Rewards) with descriptions
✅ Rewards page: Lock icon with 'Contact sales to enable this add-on' message
data_flow: ✅ Guest entry creates entry_event in PostgreSQL with decision='allowed'
✅ Exit creates entry_event with entry_type='exit' and decision='exit'
✅ Inside list queries latest event per guest to determine who's still inside
✅ History aggregates all entry_events for a guest

test_classes: TestGuestHistory (3 tests) - history structure, events, 404 handling
TestInsideGuests (3 tests) - guests array, structure, requires auth
TestExitRegistration (5 tests) - exit flow, history, inside removal, auth, 404
